title: clerodendrum fragrans
intro: Clerodendrum fragrans, also known as the moonflower or glorybower, is a tropical evergreen shrub native to Asia and Australia, characterized by its fragrant white flowers that bloom at night and typically wilt before noon. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum fragrans include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting anticonvulsant and anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of the plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions and side effects.
